segments.pain_hypothesis: Orders spread across WhatsApp and calls; no live SLA dashboard; delays not visible until complaint.
segments.offer_angle: Command Center OS: orders, drivers, SLAs, and WhatsApp follow-up in one screen.

segments.pain_hypothesis: Many leads from property portals but slow/manual follow-up; no lead scoring.
segments.offer_angle: Lead Intelligence + WhatsApp Follow-up OS: capture, score, and nurture every inquiry.

segments.pain_hypothesis: Appointments, reviews, and patient follow-up managed manually; no-show rate high.
segments.offer_angle: Patient Operations OS: booking, reminders, reviews, and recall workflows.

segments.pain_hypothesis: Delivery orders, reservations, and complaints scattered; no unified response SLA.
segments.offer_angle: Operations OS: unified inbox, reservation workflow, delivery SLA, review response.

segments.pain_hypothesis: Leads from campaigns lose interest before enrollment; manual follow-up inconsistent.
segments.offer_angle: Enrollment OS: lead capture, nurture sequence, and attendance/progress dashboard.

segments.pain_hypothesis: Managing client campaigns, reporting, and approvals across spreadsheets and chat.
segments.offer_angle: Agency Delivery OS: client workspaces, approval workflows, and live reporting.

segments.pain_hypothesis: Abandoned carts, support tickets, and reviews not connected to revenue actions.
segments.offer_angle: Revenue Operations OS: cart recovery, support SLA, and review-to-action workflow.

segments.pain_hypothesis: Proposals, procurement, and renewals tracked in email threads; no pipeline visibility.
segments.offer_angle: Proposal & Renewal OS: pipeline, proposals, follow-ups, and renewal alerts.
